title: Skeleton Rebellion Collection
description: A bold series of 16 edgy skeleton illustrations featuring attitude, cigars, and street style aesthetics.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Green Smoke Attitude
images.description: A skeleton in a torn black hoodie with red eyes, smoking a cigar with green mystical smoke and flipping the bird.

images.title: Crossbones Cigar Skeleton
images.description: Classic skull and crossbones arrangement with a lit cigar and dark smoke trails against black.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Gold Chain Recline
images.description: A relaxed skeleton in a hooded sweatshirt with a thick gold chain, smoking and gesturing.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Pinstripe Elegance
images.description: A sophisticated skeleton in a pinstripe suit and fedora with glowing green eyes and mystical smoke.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Fedora Intensity
images.description: An intense skeleton wearing both hoodie and fedora, surrounded by swirling smoke.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Vertical Stance
images.description: A standing skeleton in a torn hoodie with gold chain, holding a cigar and making a hand gesture.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Chill Mode
images.description: A laid-back skeleton in a hoodie with silver chain, reclining with cigar and attitude.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Pinstripe Lounger
images.description: A relaxed skeleton in a full pinstripe suit and fedora, reclining with cigar and hand on hat.

images.title: Leather Jacket Skeleton: Fedora Cool
images.description: A rugged skeleton in a leather jacket and fedora with red eyes, reclining with cigar.

images.title: Grim Reaper: Hooded Lounger
images.description: A skeleton in dark hooded robes, reclining with cigar and glowing red eyes.

images.title: Leather Jacket Skeleton: Fedora Attitude
images.description: A skeleton in a brown leather trench coat and fedora, one gold tooth visible, smoking with style.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Pinstripe Relax
images.description: A relaxed skeleton in a pinstripe suit and fedora, reclining with legs crossed and cigar.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Toxic Green
images.description: A skeleton in a torn hoodie with skull pendant gold chain, exhaling thick green smoke.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Red Accent
images.description: A stylish skeleton in a black suit with red shirt and fedora, reclining with cigar and smoke.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Monochrome Edge
images.description: A stark black and white skeleton in a hoodie and jeans, smoking with clean line art style.

images.title: Bare Skeleton: Classic Recline
images.description: A pure skeleton without clothing, reclining in classic pose with cigar and attitude.

title: Dark Sorceress Collection
description: A striking series of 15 dark fantasy illustrations featuring powerful sorceresses, witches, and shadowy enchantresses surrounded by thorns, moons, ravens, skulls, and arcane energy in a hauntingly atmospheric black aesthetic.

images.title: Witch of the Thorn Circle
images.description: A dark witch in a pointed hat channels swirling purple energy from both hands, standing within a glowing green thorn circle beneath a crescent moon, flanked by dead trees and hanging chains.

images.title: Shadow Demon Queen
images.description: A monstrous dark queen with writhing tentacle hair, glowing red eyes and a sinister grin rises against a crimson and purple backdrop, flanked by blood moons, bats, and grasping clawed hands.

images.title: Red-Eyed Sorceress of the Dark Moon
images.description: A pale sorceress with glowing red star-marked eyes and flowing black hair raises her clawed hands against a background of twisted trees and a crescent moon with a sleeping face.

images.title: Moonlit Witch with Red Eyes
images.description: A menacing witch in a tall decorated hat with glowing red eyes spreads her claw-like hands before a glowing full moon, surrounded by bats, crescent moons, stars, and bare skeletal trees.

images.title: Paper-Cut Witch with Staff
images.description: A paper-cut style dark witch wielding a gnarled staff and glowing red eyes stands before a crimson circle, surrounded by layered black cutout symbols including pentacles, moons, and arcane glyphs.

images.title: Dark Fairy of the Skull Grove
images.description: A graceful dark enchantress with ornate feathered crown and swirling fairy-like wings drifts among skulls and bats, her long clawed hand reaching downward in an eerie black-and-white composition.

images.title: Sorceress of the Swirling Night
images.description: A hauntingly beautiful sorceress with cracked face markings and wild flowing hair stands amid layered swirling dark energy, bats, and bare branches under a crescent moon in a paper-cut style.

images.title: Witch Beneath the Blood-Sparked Moon
images.description: A witch in a wide-brimmed hat raises her hands in a dark forest, red glowing sparks and floating eyes surrounding her as a massive full moon illuminates bats and twisted branches overhead.

images.title: Witch of the Evil Moons
images.description: A pale witch with glowing red eyes in a tall hat walks amid swirling thorned vines, skeleton hands, snarling crescent moon faces, and red-eyed bats in a dramatic paper-cut dark fantasy style.

images.title: Rune Sorceress and the Ravens
images.description: A ghostly sorceress with wild white hair and skeleton hands channels swirling energy within a rune-inscribed circle, surrounded by four red-eyed ravens and coiling thorned vines.

images.title: Shadow Queen of Wolves and Bats
images.description: A dark silhouetted queen with glowing eyes commands wolves, bats, and grasping shadow hands within a richly layered deep crimson and purple night scene framed by swirling ornamental borders.

images.title: Dark Queen of Skulls and Roses
images.description: A dramatic dark queen with antler-like raised arms, star eye markings, and an elaborate feathered gown stands amid skulls, dark roses, and bats under a sinister grinning moon.

images.title: Witch of the Skull Vines
images.description: A witch with a bent hat and flowing hair conjures floating skulls from swirling thorned vines with both hands, surrounded by bats and spiraling dark tendrils in a black-and-white illustration.

images.title: White-Haired Sorceress and Shadow Spirits
images.description: A striking sorceress with flowing white hair and a jagged feathered gown channels faint energy from both hands, surrounded by lurking shadow creatures with glowing eyes in a dark swirling background.

images.title: Witch of the Watching Forest
images.description: A solitary witch in a buckled hat carries a spiraling staff through a dark forest, her long hair swept by wind while glowing brown eyes peer from the branches and shadows around her.
